message:
ext(session): implement bd-28j2 changeset/patchset tracking + application

Full Session extension implementation for crate fsqlite-ext-session:
- ChangeOp/ConflictType/ConflictAction enums with binary encoding
- ChangesetValue encode/decode for all SQLite types (varint-prefixed)
- TableInfo with 'T' header, varint column count, PK flags, NUL name
- ChangesetRow with changeset and compact patchset binary formats
- Changeset encode/decode/invert/concat operations
- Session tracker with attach_table, record_insert/delete/update
- SimpleTarget apply engine with conflict resolution callbacks
- 44 unit tests covering value encoding, binary format round-trips,
  session tracking, inversion, concat, patchset, and all conflict types

Clippy-clean (pedantic+nursery), fmt-clean, UBS-clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
